    def test_verify_note_save_with_optional_contact_details(page: Page):
    
        username = "CSASINHN"
        password = "GOLD950"
    
        note_without_contact = (
            f"Test Save without Contact Details {int(time.time())}"
        )
    
        note_with_contact = (
            f"Test Save with Contact Details {int(time.time())}"
        )
    
        phone_number = "(987) 654-3210"
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 1 : Login
        # =====================================================
    
        login(
            page,
            username,
            password
        )
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 2 : Open Orders
        # =====================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "complementary"
        ).get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Orders",
            exact=True
        ).click()
    
        order_ids = get_order_ids(page)
    
        assert len(order_ids) > 0
    
        selected_order = order_ids[0]
    
        open_order(
            page,
            selected_order
        )
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 3 : Open Add Note Dialog
        # =====================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="+ Add More"
        ).click()
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 4 : Verify Contact Type Options
        # =====================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Select"
        ).nth(1).click()
    
        expected_options = [
            "E-Commerce",
            "E-Mail",
            "Fax",
            "Phone"
        ]
    
        for option in expected_options:
    
            expect(
                page.get_by_role(
                    "button",
                    name=option
                )
            ).to_be_visible()
    
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 5 : Save WITHOUT Contact Details
        # =====================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Select"
        ).first.click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="ImportOrder"
        ).click()
    
        note_box = page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Type instruction here."
        )
    
        note_box.fill(
            note_without_contact
        )
    
        apply_button = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Apply"
        )
    
        expect(
            apply_button
        ).to_be_enabled()
    
        apply_button.click()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_text(
                note_without_contact
            )
        ).to_be_visible()
    
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 6 : Verify Note Saved Without Contact Details
        # =====================================================
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_text(
                note_without_contact
            )
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # Phone number should not be displayed since
        # contact details were intentionally left blank.
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_text(
                phone_number
            )
        ).to_have_count(0)
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 7 : Add Another Note
        # =====================================================
    
        page.get_by_role("button", name="Order Notes").click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="+ Add More"
        ).click()
    
        # =====================================================
        # STEP 8 : Select Note Type
        # =====================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Select"
        ).first.click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="ImportOrder"
